title: Entity (v2 primitive)
description: A thing that persists — has identity, has state over time. One of the six v2 root primitives. Minimal fields only; richer types come from composition via the `compose` operator.

kind_ref.description: The kind this entity is an instance of (e.g., 'Agent', 'legal.ContractClause').

attributes.description: Typed attribute bag. Schema depends on kind_ref.

relations.description: References to Relations this entity participates in. Populated by the engine; not authored directly.

scope_ref.description: Scope this entity belongs to. Determines memory visibility + retention.
